The value of $10(x+y+z)$

questions.subject: Chemistry
questions.examName: Most Important Selected Qs for JEE Advanced
questions.q: A mixture of 1 mole each of $\mathrm{LiNO}_3$ and $\mathrm{NaNO}_3$ is heated. The total number of moles of gaseous products formed are $x$ and the residue contains $y$ moles of two different solids. The value of $20(x+y)$ is
questions.solution:
Answer (65)
$\begin{aligned}
& \underset{1}{4 \mathrm{LiNO}_3} \rightarrow \underset{(0.5)}{2 \mathrm{Li}_2 \mathrm{O}}+\underset{(1)}{4 \mathrm{NO}_2}+\underset{(0.25)}{\mathrm{O}_2} \\
& \underset{1}{\mathrm{NaNO}_3} \rightarrow \underset{1}{\mathrm{NaNO}_2}+\frac{1}{2} \mathrm{O}_2
\end{aligned}$

Moles of gases $=1+0.75=x$
Moles of solid $=1.5=y$
$\therefore \quad x+y=3.25$
questions.source: Most Important Selected Qs for JEE Advanced
